sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check player position after LEFT move
lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("Player area:")
for r in range(38, 48):
    if r < len(lines):
        row_str = lines[r]
        print(f"Row {r} cols 3-18: '{row_str[3:19]}'")

# Check player node
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"\nPlayer: id={n['id']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
        adj = seg['adjacency_list']
        player_adj = [pair for pair in adj if n['id'] in pair]
        print(f"Adjacent to: {player_adj}")
        for pair in player_adj:
            other_id = pair[0] if pair[1] == n['id'] else pair[1]
            other = next(x for x in nodes if x['id'] == other_id)
            print(f"  -> id={other_id}, color={other['color']}, pixels={other['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
